  • app — Flask application
  • db_config — database connection settings

Module_4 assignment - Flask app db backend with tests
  • Module 4 — Applicant Data Pipeline
  • View page source

Module 4 — Applicant Data Pipeline

Flask application that scrapes Grad Cafe applicant data, loads it into PostgreSQL, and displays SQL analysis results.

User Guide

  • Getting Started
    • Overview
    • Prerequisites
    • Project layout
    • Setup
    • Environment variables
    • Create the database
    • Run the Flask app
    • Run tests
    • Build documentation
    • Typical workflow
    • Troubleshooting
  • Architecture
    • Web layer
    • ETL layer
    • Database layer
  • Testing Guide
    • Markers
    • Selectors
    • Fixtures
    • Test doubles
    • Running tests by layer

API Reference

  • app — Flask application
    • get_database_url()
    • try_start_pull_data()
    • finish_pull_data()
    • is_pull_data_running()
    • get_db_connection()
    • run_python_script()
    • load_watermark()
    • save_watermark()
    • parse_added_on_date()
    • read_json_records()
    • get_latest_added_on()
    • format_analysis_value()
    • format_analysis_answer_lines()
    • create_app()
  • db_config — database connection settings
    • get_database_url()
    • get_connect_kwargs()
    • connect()
  • query_data — SQL analysis queries
    • get_connection()
    • convert_decimal()
    • execute_query()
    • get_all_query_results()
  • load_data — JSON loader
    • clean_obj()
    • parse_float()
    • parse_date()
    • normalize_records()
    • read_json_or_jsonl()
    • pick()
    • load_json_to_postgres()
  • create_database — database initialization
    • start_postgres()
